summary: Iteration 17 testing complete. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified: Nav shows 'Κατάστημα', Shop page has Εισιτήρια/Ρουχισμός tabs, Admin panel has Προϊόντα/Εισιτήρια/Παραγγελίες tabs with full CRUD functionality. Ticket can be added to cart when logged in.
seed_data_creation: Test products and tickets created during testing were cleaned up. Existing seeded data: 6 products, 1 seasonal ticket.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 17 tested admin CMS tabs (Products, Tickets, Orders) and restructured shop page. All APIs working: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE for products and tickets, GET/PUT for orders, POST for cart/add-ticket. Shop page has two tabs: Εισιτήρια (tickets) and Ρουχισμός (merchandise). Admin panel sidebar shows: Προϊόντα, Εισιτήρια, Παραγγελίες tabs.

shop_page.merchandise_products: PASS - 7 products displayed with delivery options badges
shop_page.add_ticket_to_cart: PASS - Ticket added to cart when logged in, shows success message

admin_panel.products_tab: PASS - AdminProductsTab loads with form and products list
admin_panel.tickets_tab: PASS - AdminTicketsTab loads with form and tickets list
admin_panel.orders_tab: PASS - AdminOrdersTab loads with orders list and status dropdowns
